text: macOS stat -f formatting failed because agent shell resolved GNU stat; shell recipe should include a portable file-metadata command
Alias inspection guessed src/commands/aliases/helpers.ts because no local index documents the shared helper filename; a short aliases README or exported surface map would prevent the dead-end read.

Repo format script uses oxfmt, but invoking npx prettier silently fetched a different formatter and rewrote touched TypeScript with incompatible wrapping; a formatter guard or documented per-file command would prevent noisy diffs.

A shell verification snippet assigned to the zsh-reserved read-only variable `status`, aborting follow-on checks; shared shell guidance should list zsh reserved names or standardize agent execs on POSIX sh.
The papercuts CLI positional `-` stdin contract was not obvious and `--stdin` failed; showing the accepted stdin form in `papercuts add --help` examples would prevent a dead-end invocation.

A shell smoke-test loop treated quoted command strings as ordinary words and stopped after the first command; a shared helper for JSON-envelope smoke matrices would avoid fragile shell word-splitting.
zsh reserves the variable name status as read-only; shell verification cleanup wrappers should use rc instead

Nested alias parents such as 'elv agents tests' return missing-subcommand errors instead of the structured help envelope used by ops/config/spec parents; consistent parent-command help would make discovery first-try.
